title: senecio troncosii
intro: Senecio troncosii, a member of the daisy family, is a shrub-like plant native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio troncosii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in the region. In herbal preparations, Senecio troncosii is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and poultices to treat a range of ailments.
